ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player's position */,
  "height" REAL /* Player's height in inches */,
  "weight" REAL /* Player's weight in pounds */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the player is active */,
  "status" TEXT /* Player's status (e.g., active, injured, graduated) */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* Player's high school */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Player's hometown */,
  "recruiting_rank" INTEGER /* Player's recruiting rank */,
  "redshirt_status" INTEGER /* Player's redshirt status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "head_coach" TEXT /* Name of the head coach */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conference ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "gp_gs" TEXT /* Games played and games started */,
  "effic" REAL /* Efficiency rating */,
  "att_cmp_int" TEXT /* Completions, attempts, and interceptions */,
  "pct" REAL /* Passing percentage */,
  "yds" INTEGER /* Yards passed */,
  "td" INTEGER /* Touchdowns */,
  "lng" INTEGER /* Longest pass */,
  "avg_g" REAL /* Average yards per game */,
  "sack" INTEGER /* Number of sacks */,
  "fum" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "opponent_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opposing team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., Win, Loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the game */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_opponent_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "championship_game" INTEGER /* Whether the season ended with a championship game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conference" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, scout, analyst) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the player data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the statistic */,
  "stat_type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., game, season, career) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Expected recovery date */,
  "games_missed" INTEGER /* Number of games missed due to the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" TEXT /* Year the award was received */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., conference, national) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruiting_profiles" (
  "profile_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruiting profile */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "high_school_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in their high school */,
  "national_rank" INTEGER /* National ranking of the player */,
  "recruiting_class" TEXT /* Year of the player's recruiting class */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date of commitment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("profile_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruiting_profiles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
